title: Labubu Totem
description: This totem will be great for PVP because it matches the best trends of summer 2025. This totem will always be with you and in an awkward situation Labubu will save you from death.
body: This totem will be great for PVP because it matches the best trends of summer 2025. This totem will always be with you and in an awkward situation Labubu will save you from death.
